description: AD1 federal planning and para-statal administration statutes and regulation admitted from the prepared source inventory.
notes: Normalized from prompts/cluster-2-batches/lex-mex-cl2-batch-AD1.json for the repository Rust ingestion gate.
All six prepared entries were absent from adapters, corpus/mx, and existing operational batch manifests when this manifest was created.
The prepared manifest contains no blocked entries and no expected_edges; none were invented during normalization.
The prepared official Cámara de Diputados reference-page and consolidated-PDF URL pairs are preserved. A live recheck on 2026-07-16 was inconclusive because the Cámara host failed its TLS handshake.
Instrument order is preserved from the prepared cluster-2 plan; the LFEP parent statute precedes its regulation.

instruments.title: LEY Federal de las Entidades Paraestatales
